entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `sourceText` TEXT NOT NULL, `resultText` TEXT NOT NULL, `direction` TEXT NOT NULL, `confidence` REAL NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `entryPoint` TEXT NOT NULL, `isStarred` INTEGER NOT NULL, `wasEdited` INTEGER NOT NULL, `wasReversed` INTEGER NOT NULL)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `word` TEXT NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_exceptions_word
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_exceptions_word` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`word`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`sourceText` TEXT NOT NULL, `resultText` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`conversions`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_conversions_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `conversions` BEGIN DELETE FROM `conversions_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_conversions_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `conversions` BEGIN DELETE FROM `conversions_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_conversions_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `conversions` BEGIN INSERT INTO `conversions_fts`(`docid`, `sourceText`, `resultText`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`sourceText`, NEW.`resultText`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_conversions_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `conversions` BEGIN INSERT INTO `conversions_fts`(`docid`, `sourceText`, `resultText`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`sourceText`, NEW.`resultText`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '0658f4511c1d0554b063e5b7002496fc')
